source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 中共中央政治局召开会议
topics.official_english: Politburo of the CPC Central Committee holds a meeting
topics.why_hot: The Politburo meeting sets the policy direction for the country, attracting widespread attention.
topics.share_angle: Explain the key decisions and their impact on people's daily lives.

topics.official_english: Germany national football team disbands immediately
topics.why_hot: Germany's early exit from the World Cup shocked fans, leading to team dissolution.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the reasons behind Germany's performance and the future of the team.

topics.why_hot: Summer fruit prices dropping benefits consumers but hurts farmers.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the market factors causing the price drop and its impact on agriculture.

topics.chinese_topic: @高考考生 这些骗局要当心
topics.official_english: College entrance exam candidates beware of these scams
topics.why_hot: Post-exam period is prime time for fraud targeting students and parents.
topics.share_angle: List common scams and provide tips to avoid them.

topics.chinese_topic: 沃尔玛、永辉、小象超市抽检沦陷
topics.official_english: Walmart, Yonghui, and Ele.me supermarkets fail spot checks
topics.why_hot: Food safety concerns at major retailers alarm the public.
topics.share_angle: Explain the findings and what consumers should watch out for.

topics.chinese_topic: 国务院：探索延长义务教育年限
topics.official_english: State Council explores extending compulsory education years
topics.why_hot: Education reform directly affects millions of families and students.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the potential benefits and challenges of extending compulsory education.

topics.chinese_topic: 豪车跳水致二手车大降价：保时捷15万
topics.official_english: Luxury car prices plunge, used Porsche sells for 150,000 yuan
topics.why_hot: Sharp price drops in luxury cars make them more accessible to average consumers.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the reasons behind the price drop and what it means for the car market.

topics.chinese_topic: 中山大学万余名毕业生8秒自助拨穗
topics.official_english: Sun Yat-sen University graduates use 8-second self-service tassel turning
topics.why_hot: Innovative graduation ceremony format sparks discussion on efficiency and tradition.
topics.share_angle: Explore how technology is changing traditional ceremonies and student reactions.
